---
title: "Erwin Lares"
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

::: {.column-screen-inset}

## Hi, I'm Erwin

I'm a linguist, a data scientist, a potter, a dog dad and an aikidoist. I finished
my PhD in linguistics at UW-Madison in 2022, and I currently work as a
Research Data Science Consultant at the Office of Research
Cyberinfrastructure. I also lead the Badger R User Group, run a pottery
business, and teach Aikido in Janesville, WI.

This site is where all of those things live together.

:::

::: {.column-screen-inset .grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6 .card .p-4 .m-2}
### Day Job
Research Data Science Consultant at UW-Madison. I help researchers
work smarter with data, 

[Learn more →](day-job/index.qmd)
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6 .card .p-4 .m-2}
### Pottery
las rubieras pottery — functional stoneware made in Wisconsin.
Especially active in the summer.

[Visit the shop →](https://lasrubieraspottery.com)
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6 .card .p-4 .m-2}
### Aikido
Capital Aikikai of Wisconsin, based in Janesville. An aikido martial art dojo centered
on harmony, movement, and practice.

[Visit the dojo →](https://aikidoofwisconsin.com)
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6 .card .p-4 .m-2}
### BRUG
The Badger R User Group — a community of practice for researchers
who code in R at UW-Madison.

[Visit BRUG →](https://erwinlares.github.io/the-burrows)
:::

:::
